title: EXPRESSION AND PURIFICATION OF HUMAN NEMO (GST-GFP-NEMO)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"84jf3","text":"This protocol describes how to express and purify human NEMO (IKK-γ) tagged N-terminally with GST and EGFP. The expression is performed with E. coli Rosetta pLysS cells. The protein is purified via a GST batch purification and gel filtration (SEC). ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":141,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"9i583","text":"pGEX-GST-Thrombin-TEV-GFP-NEMO (Addgene ID: 199781)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"85gck","text":"E. coli Rosetta (DE3) pLysS cells","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5lmat","text":"LB medium with antibiotics: 50 μl/ml ampicillin and 34 μl/ml chloramphenicol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"432sq","text":"IPTG (Isopropyl-β-D-thiogalactopyranosid)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3p2tu","text":"Thrombin (Serva, #36402.01)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4j2m3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f71gm","text":"Columns/Resin:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b86ri","text":"Glutathione Sepharose 4B (Cytiva, #17075605)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"62g5f","text":"Superose 6 increase 10/300 column (Cytiva, #17517201)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Grow E. coli Rosetta (DE3) pLysS cells in 2 L LB medium at 37 °C until achieving an OD 600 nm of 0.4.
Reduce temperature to 18 °C and continue growth to OD 600 nm of 0.8.
Induce protein expression with 250 micromolar (µM) IPTG and continue growth for ~ 16:00:00 at 18 °C
Centrifuge the cells at 3000 rcf ( 4 °C , 00:15:00 )
Aspirate media and resuspend cell pellet in ~ 10 ml of 1X PBS, centrifuge the cells at 3000 rcf ( 4 °C , 00:15:00 ) and take off the supernatant.
Flash freeze the pellet in liquid nitrogen and store at -80 °C until use.
Thaw pellet and resuspend in Lysis Buffer with freshly added 2 millimolar (mM) β-Mercaptoethanol, Roche Protease Inhibitor and DNAse I
Sonicate sample 00:00:30 at 65% power for 5 cycles (Bandelin Sonopuls)
Centrifuge at 48000 rcf at 4 °C for 00:45:00
Repeat sonication for a total of 3X
Incubate the sample on equilibrated beads on a tube roller at 4 °C for 04:00:00
During this step, equilibrate 3 mL Glutathione Sepharose 4B beads by washing the slurry with water and Wash Buffer 1 (~ 6 ml).
Filter supernatant after centrifugation through a 0.45 µm syringe filter
Wash beads 5X with Wash Buffer 1
Wash beads 1X with Wash Buffer 2 These wash steps remove nonspecific proteins
Wash beads 2X with Wash Buffer 1 These washes remove high salt concentration
Cleave the resulting sample to produce GFP-NEMO by incubating with thrombin Overnight at 4 °C
Centrifuge beads at 3000 rcf for 00:03:00 at 4 °C
Collect supernatant and filter through .45 µm syringe filter
Concentrate product to a final volume of 500 µL using a 10 kDa MWCO concentrator
The concentrated and filtered protein can be applied onto a Superose 6 increase column (10/300 Cytiva) pre-equillibrated with SEC buffer This step can remove contamination and degradation products

Fractions containing the purified proteins are pooled, concentrated, frozen in liquid nitrogen and stored at - 80°C Protein purity can be determined by SDS PAGE analysis and measurement of protein concentration
creator: OLIVIA HARDING
